title: papaver somniferum subsp. hortense
intro: Papaver somniferum subsp. hortense, also known as the Oriental poppy, is a subspecies of opium poppy that is grown for its ornamental and medicinal properties. The plant contains alkaloids such as morphine, codeine, and thebaine, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Papaver somniferum subsp. hortense include pain relief, cough suppression, and sedation, making it beneficial for individuals with conditions such as insomnia, coughs, and minor injuries. Herbal preparations of this plant, including tinctures and extracts, can be used to harness its medicinal properties, but it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
